reviews.review_description: It's good. But it's just a bus driving. Feels Good for sometimes. But I think price is slightly high. But ok if you are getting it on sale.

This Bus Simulator VR game is surprisingly enjoyable and wellmade...... The missions are engaging, especially the passenger pickup and drop-off tasks  they feel smooth, clear, and fun to complete.. The bus skins are also really good offering nice variety and giving each vehicle its own style....

Overall, it’s a solid and immersive simulator experience. With a few more updates and refinements, it can easily become one of the top VR bus games on the Meta Store!

This VR Bus Simulator is surprisingly immersive and really well put together. The passenger pick-and-drop missions are fun, engaging, and feel very realistic in VR. The overall storyline keeps things interesting as you progress through different routes and challenges. The environment is also nicely designed with great attention to detail, making the whole experience feel alive and enjoyable.

This is just a driving game. It would be fun if you actually interacted with the passengers when they board and more hand controls to open and close the door at stops. It was a waste of money even on sale. Needs upgrades.
